texto: You must see yourself with it before you can have it.It comes down to three questions: 1. Do you believe you can have it? 2. Do you believe you deserve it?3. How bad do you want it?If you believe you can have it, you believe you deserve it, and you want it bad enough; you will envision yourself with it and work to get it!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Michelle Hollis que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “You must see yourself with it before you can have it.It comes down to three questions: 1. Do you …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, believe, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e trabalho.
